name: OmopMedicationDispenseDrugExposureView
title: MedicationDispense → drug_exposure (flat)
description: Pharmacy dispensing events. One FHIR MedicationDispense produces one OMOP drug_exposure row with drug_type_concept_id = 38000175 (Prescription dispensed in pharmacy). Date is taken from whenHandedOver (fallback whenPrepared). End date is computed from start + daysSupply, or defaults to start date. No reviewed reference implementation covers this mapping; the spec is reconstructed from OMOP drug_exposure schema and FHIR R4 MedicationDispense definition.

column.name: drug_concept_id
column.description: RxNorm / ATC / NDC -> OMOP standard concept. Resolve medicationCodeableConcept or medicationReference

column.name: drug_exposure_start_date
column.description: The date medication was supplied. Fallback to whenPrepared if whenHandedOver absent — transform: date(whenHandedOver ?? whenPrepared)

column.name: drug_exposure_start_datetime
column.description: Full ISO datetime — transform: whenHandedOver ?? whenPrepared

column.name: drug_exposure_end_date
column.description: If daysSupply present: end = start + daysSupply. Otherwise fallback to start date — transform: date(start + daysSupply) ?? start_date

column.name: days_supply
column.description: Days of medication supplied. Direct FHIR field on MedicationDispense (unlike MedicationRequest where it must be computed)

column.name: sig
column.description: Free-text dosage instructions. Fallback to patientInstruction

column.name: route_concept_id
column.description: SNOMED route codes -> OMOP Route domain

column.name: drug_source_value
column.description: Best code by vocabulary priority (RxNorm > ATC > NDC > SNOMED)

column.name: dose_unit_source_value
column.description: Raw dose unit string from doseQuantity.unit or .code

where.description: status != 'entered-in-error' AND status != 'cancelled' AND status != 'declined' AND status != 'stopped'
